description.default: We once had a scare with Assurance where ALL loan officers were missing a branch code. This means that for Branch Managers, we have no way of knowing what loan officers are in the branch, and therefore that kind of login does not work properly. This value is used by our integrity checker: if fewer than this many assigned loan officers are found, an email alert is generated

label.description: We once had a scare with Assurance where ALL loan officers were missing a branch code. This means that for Branch Managers, we have no way of knowing what loan officers are in the branch, and therefore that kind of login does not work properly. This value is used by our integrity checker: if fewer than this many assigned loan officers are found, an email alert is generated
